institution.name: West Kentucky Community and Technical College

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at West Kentucky Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at West Kentucky Community and Technical College fell 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.2k → $6.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at West Kentucky Community and Technical College rose 25% between 2006 and 2009 (31.3% → 39.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at West Kentucky Community and Technical College fell 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.5k → $9.0k).
